previous_blocking_findings.resolution: E2E-07 Terrain Interaction added: bullet destroys brick, bullet vs steel, tank vs water, tank vs forest
E2E-08 Tank/Bullet Collision added: tank-tank block, bullet-bullet mutual destruction, tank vs brick wall
E2E-09 Edge Cases added: boundary clamp, Enter restart, Space during respawn/destroyed/gameover, spawn deferral
Enter restart covered in E2E-09, terrain interaction covered in E2E-07

observations.title: AC-008 diagonal input rejection not covered in E2E
observations.detail: test-plan.md §6 E2E-06 step 2 要求覆盖对角线输入拒绝，但 AC-008 在 coverage matrix 中属于 Unit 类型测试。E2E-09 未包含该用例，不构成阻塞。
